creator: plakshmanan2001@yahoo.co.in
text:
Hello FreeBsd_group

      

    When I installing  mysql-server-3.22.32 package , one error message will appear that is "Add of package mysql-server-3.22.32 aborted, errror code 1- please check the debug screen for more info".


    After Installation completed, the I put the command "mysql" in #prompt, It will also display one error message .  The error message is "Error 2002: Can't connect to local mysql server through scocket /var/lib/mysql/mysql.scok (2)".


   Please mail me regarding this error on mysql .  I am waiting for your valueable help.
  
  Thanking you.

   One of the FreeBSD User from India
   p.lakshmanan

   email: plakshmanan2001@yahoo.co.in
